targets.boundary: Ambition-based subset of Scope 1, Scope 2 (market-based), and Scope 3 emissions within Alphabet’s climate ambition boundary.
targets.notes: Alphabet aims to reduce absolute, combined scope 1, 2 (market-based), and 3 emissions by 50% from a 2019 base year by 2030; the ambition was validated in 2025 by SBTi using the Corporate Near-Term Criteria Version 5.2 and a cross-sector absolute reduction method aligned with a 1.5°C scenario.
targets.title: Carbon reduction moonshot

targets.boundary: All operations and value chain emissions for Alphabet Inc. and subsidiaries.
targets.notes: Alphabet aims to reach net-zero emissions across all operations and value chain by 2030 by reducing absolute, combined scope 1, 2 (market-based), and 3 emissions by 50% from a 2019 base year and investing in carbon removal solutions to neutralize remaining emissions.
targets.title: Net-zero emissions across operations and value chain by 2030
